commands.review_summary:
The PR refactors model-fallback runtime resolution so CLI-owned candidates bypass auth-profile cooldown filtering, with regression tests for configured CLI providers and canonical Anthropic models resolved to `claude-cli`.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +59. Total +92 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main resolves CLI runtime policy for harness availability but still applies the auth-profile cooldown gate to every candidate; the PR body also supplies terminal proof that the patched path reaches the callback for `anthropic` resolved to `claude-cli` while `anthropic:default` is cooling down.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A human maintainer should accept the auth-provider compatibility decision and decide how to handle the linked issue's broader plugin-harness scope; no narrow automation repair is currently required.

target.title: fix(agents): skip auth cooldown gate for CLI providers
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
